_note: Source of truth for `main` branch protection. Apply with scripts/apply-branch-protection.sh arpitarya fux main. SOLO REPO: required_pull_request_reviews is null on purpose — a sole developer cannot approve their own PR, so a review requirement is unsatisfiable friction, not a control. The real wall is: required `fux gate` check + enforce_admins:true + no force-push/deletion. That still routes every change through a green-gate PR (no direct commit to main by anyone, incl. admins). enforce_admins MUST stay true; setting it false is a real weakening of the wall (see docs/constitution-enforcement-handoff.md §2f). If this repo gains a second maintainer, restore required_pull_request_reviews.required_approving_review_count=1.
